description: Don't allow the monsoon to dictate your fashion sense! Wear these stylish sandals from catwalk to brave the elements and look fabulous. This pair goes with denims, skirts and even leggings. Upper Soft velvety upper with a toe separator Perforations on the upper and sides Elasticated on the sides for comfort and durability Slip-on shape Brand embossed on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with upraised heel shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
